channel.title: FOSS on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in FOSS on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: nutritionR: NLP nutrition analysis in R
item.description: I’m a bit of a nutrition nerd and I’ve been wanting to do some analysis of recipes that I cook a lot just because I’m curious about some of their properties. To get closer to that goal, I decided to write a package, nutritionR, that can perform a nutritional analysis of foods and recipes expressed in natural language. nutritionR does this by wrapping the Nutritionix API. It requires a free developer API key or above.

item.title: pyMTurkR: An R package for MTurk Requesters
item.description: For the past three months I've been working on [pyMTurkR](https://github.com/cloudyr/pyMTurkR): An R package to interface with MTurk’s Requester API. It's a replacement for / successor to the now defunct MTurkR package. I've used MTurk as a source of convenience sample data for a lot of my social science research, and I like to use R for automating a lot of MTurk tasks like granting bonuses, approving assignments, etc.
